category_sources: source_facts.description says charm manages Juju Charms; the official repository README says the charm command accesses the Juju charm store.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is charm; the official repository README documents the executable as charm.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; the README is the official project documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Juju Charm management; the official README lists charm store commands such as push, pull, release, and show.
